title: Davis Food Co-op
description: Community-owned grocery co-op with local, organic, and bulk foods. A Davis institution since 1972.

title: Trader Joe's Davis
description: Popular specialty grocery chain with affordable organic, international, and unique food items.

title: Nugget Markets – Covell
description: Premium local grocery chain with an excellent cheese department, prepared foods, and craft beer selection.

title: Safeway Davis
description: 24-hour grocery chain near campus. Convenient for late-night snack runs and basic staples.

title: Target Davis
description: Full-size Target with grocery, clothing, electronics, and home goods. Closest big-box store to campus.

title: Davis Farmers Market
address: Central Park, 4th St & C St, Davis, CA 95616
description: Year-round farmers market with 60+ vendors every Saturday and Wednesday. Beloved Davis tradition.

title: Avid Reader Bookstore
description: Beloved independent bookstore in downtown Davis with author events and a carefully curated selection.

title: The Artery
description: Local art gallery and gift shop supporting Davis-area artists with handmade gifts, prints, and jewelry.

title: Toad Hollow
description: Fun downtown Davis shop with unusual gifts, games, toys, and novelty items.

title: University Bookstore (UC Davis)
address: University Bookstore, 1 Shields Ave, Davis, CA 95616
description: Official UC Davis bookstore with textbooks, Aggie gear, school supplies, and tech accessories.

title: Alphabet Moon
description: Children's toy and book shop in downtown Davis with imaginative gifts for all ages.

title: Bicycle Intermodal Hub (B Street)
description: Bike shop and repair co-op in downtown Davis. Essential for getting around the bike-friendly city.

title: Second Chance Thrift Store
description: Affordable thrift and vintage clothing with rotating stock. Great for budget-conscious students.

title: Grocery Outlet Bargain Market
description: Discount grocery store with rotating overstock items at steep discounts. Great for meal prep on a budget.

title: Woodland Farmers Market
description: Thursday evening market in historic Woodland with seasonal produce, crafts, and prepared foods.

title: Davis Commons Shopping Center
description: North Davis shopping center anchored by a full Safeway, plus services and local eateries.

title: Old Sacramento Waterfront Shopping
description: Historic waterfront district with boutique shops, fudge stores, candy shops, and tourist goods.

title: K Street Mall Sacramento
description: Downtown Sacramento's pedestrian shopping street with chain stores, boutiques, and street vendors.

title: Freeborn Hall Flea Market
address: Freeborn Hall, UC Davis, Davis, CA 95616
description: Seasonal campus flea market hosted by student organizations. Great source for cheap textbooks and furniture.

title: Davis ReUse
description: Community reuse store selling lightly used furniture, bikes, household goods, and more.
